title: September 1
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 1''' is the 244th day of the year (245th in leap years). There are 121 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1920s#1926|1926]] – [[Gene Colan]] is born.
*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[Timothy Zahn]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Maury Sterling]] is born.
*1971 – [[Landry Q. Walker]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Adrienne Wilkinson]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[20th Century Studios|20th Century Fox's]] IP and licensing rights to ''Star Wars'', excluding ''A New Hope''{{'s}} copyright, revert to [[Lucasfilm]]
*[[1984]] – [[Jack Roth]] is born.
*1984 – [[Ludwig Göransson]] is born.
*1984 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 63|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 63]] published.
*[[1992]] – [[Classic Star Wars 2|''Classic Star Wars'' 2]] published.
*[[1993]] – [[Classic Star Wars 12|''Classic Star Wars'' 12]] published.
*1993 – ''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Three]]'' published.
*[[1994]] – ''[[Champions of the Force]]'' published.
*1994 – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 2]] published.
*1994 – [[Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures 2|''Classic Star Wars: The Early Adventures'' 2]] is published.
*1994 – ''[[Classic Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back 2]]'' is published.
*[[1995]] – [[Young Jedi Knights: Shadow Academy|''Shadow Academy'']] published.
*1995 – ''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' published.
*[[1996]] – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Jedi Under Siege]]'' published.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Star Wars Missions 1: Assault on Yavin Four]]'' published.
*1997 – ''[[Star Wars Kids (1997)]]'' released.
*1997 – ''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Kenobi's Blade]]'' published.
*1997 – [[Star Wars Insider 35|''Star Wars Insider'' 35]] published.
*[[1998]] – ''[[The Star Wars Cookbook: Wookiee Cookies and Other Galactic Recipes]]'' published.
*1998 – ''[[Vision of the Future]]'' published.
*1998 – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Trouble on Cloud City]]'' published.
*1998 – ''[[Star Wars Missions 13: Prisoner of the Nikto Pirates]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – [[Star Wars: Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand (trade paperback)|''Mara Jade: By the Emperor's Hand'' trade paperback]] published.
*1999 – [[Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi 3|''Star Wars Manga: Return of the Jedi'' 3]] published.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars Gamer 1|''Star Wars Gamer'' 1]] published.
*[[2001]] – ''[[Jedi Quest: Path to Truth]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – [[Star Wars Insider 70|''Star Wars Insider'' 70]] published.
*[[2005]] – ''[[The Last of the Jedi: Dark Warning]]'' published.
*[[2006]] – [[Star Wars Insider 90|''Star Wars Insider'' 90]] released for subscribers.
*[[2008]] – [[Don LaFontaine]] dies.
*2008 – ''[[Star Wars Annual 2009]]'' published
*[[2009]] – ''[[Rebel Force: Firefight]]'' published.
*2009 – ''[[A New Hope: The Life of Luke Skywalker]]'' published.
*2009 – [[Star Wars Insider 111|''Star Wars Insider'' 111]] published.
*[[2010]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Hero of the Confederacy (trade paperback)|''Star Wars The Clone Wars: Hero of the Confederacy'' trade paperback]] published.
*2010 – ''[[The Old Republic 3]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – [[Star Wars: The Complete Saga (book)|''Star Wars: The Complete Saga'']] published.
*[[2012]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Anakin to the Rescue!]]'' published.
*2012 – ''[[Star Wars: Phonics]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – [[Jedi Academy (novel)|''Jedi Academy'']] published.
*[[2014]] – "[[Property of Ezra Bridger]]" premieres on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2015]] – ''[[The Original Trilogy Stories]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Free the Galaxy]]'' published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars: Star Pilot (2015)|''Star Wars: Star Pilot'']] [[The Walt Disney Company|Disney]] reissue edition published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars: The Story of Darth Vader (2015)|''Star Wars: The Story of Darth Vader'']] reissued.
*2015 – ''[[Star Wars Rebels: Complete Season One]]'' released.
*[[2017]] – [[Journey to Star Wars: The Last Jedi|Journey to ''Star Wars: The Last Jedi'']] begins with [[Force Friday|Force Friday II]].
*2017 – ''[[A Leader Named Leia]]'' published.
*2017 – ''[[Leia, Princess of Alderaan]]'' published.
*2017 – [[Leia, Princess of Alderaan (audiobook)|''Leia, Princess of Alderaan'' audiobook]] published.
*2017 – [[Phasma (novel)|''Phasma'']] published.
*2017 – [[Phasma (audiobook)|''Phasma'' audiobook]] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars: The Power of the Force (book)|''Star Wars: The Power of the Force'']] published.
*[[2020]] – ''[[Thrawn Ascendancy: Chaos Rising]]'' published.
*2020 – [[Thrawn Ascendancy: Chaos Rising (audiobook)|''Thrawn Ascendancy: Chaos Rising'' audiobook]] released.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Rebellion Vol. 4]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – [[The High Republic (2021) 9|''The High Republic'' (2021) 9]] published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2021) 8|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2021) 8]] published.
*[[2023]] – "[[Off the Rails / The Thieves of Tharnaka]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*[[2026]] – ''[[Hyperspace Stories: Mace]]'' to be published.
*2026 – [[Untitled middle grade novel]] to be published.
*2026 – ''[[Star Wars: The Phantom Menace: A Visual Archive]]'' to be published.
